final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-video cover for an 8K GGU gaming monitor launch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist, premium aesthetic — exact restraint level is yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds layout
Subject: must include the 8K GGU gaming monitor as focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as large headline, must include "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as supporting copy
Constraints: must be vertical format optimized for short-video cover, large headline must be eye-catching
Avoid:
